title: haworthiopsis × curta
intro: Haworthiopsis × curta is a rare, hybrid succulent plant resulting from the cross between Haworthia truncata and Haworthia fasciata. This plant is valued for its unique, compact growth habit and attractive, wavy foliage. Haworthiopsis × curta is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate various health issues. The plant's leaves and stems are sometimes used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of medicinal and health benefits.
